_comment: JSON does not support comments, so the setup guidance lives in these helper fields. Keep your actual memories inside the memories array below.
imagesDirectory: Place your personal images inside public/images and reference them as /images/your-file-name.jpg.
howToEdit: Replace the empty memories array with your own entries to load your personal memory collection.
Each entry should include id, title, date, image, description, occasionType, and tags.
Optional fields: fullDescription for the fullscreen modal, sortDate in YYYY-MM-DD format for more precise ordering, and year if you want to override the year parsed from date.

exampleEntry.title: Trip to the Mountains
exampleEntry.description: Weekend trip with college friends after final exams.
exampleEntry.fullDescription: Weekend trip with college friends after final exams. Add more detail here if you want the modal to tell a fuller story.
